title: FollowData
description:
`follow` (enrollment + first-receive). Each offered skill is a TOFU offer, never auto-landed.
**INFERRED** (additive-only). The enrollment-disclosure fields (`deployment_mode` /
`workspace_display_name` / `verified_domain*`) and the two-call `pending` arm were added as the
enrollment surface landed; all are optional, so an old consumer ignores them.

currency.description:
The currency-trigger outcome, present when completing the enrollment armed the session-start hook
(a pure follower never runs `add`, so enrollment is where their currency gets armed — best-effort:
a degraded config edit is disclosed here, never a rolled-back enrollment).

deployment_mode.description: The workspace's deployment posture (disclosed from the bootstrap).

pending.description:
Present when `follow` returned a pending device-authorization that needs a human verification step
(the client's two-call enrollment surface — visit the URL, then re-run `follow`).

skills.description: First-receive offers — empty when the link is membership-only.

verified_domain.description: The workspace's org-domain claim, if any (disclosed from the bootstrap).

verified_domain_status.description: The workspace's domain-verification state (disclosed from the bootstrap).

workspace_display_name.description: The workspace display name (disclosed from the bootstrap).

CurrencyKind.description:
What fires currency for a harness — drives HONEST receipt copy ("current by next session",
"next topos touch", …). `ExplicitPullOnly` is the honest-degrade floor.

DeploymentMode.description:
A plane's deployment posture — a CLOSED set. `cloud` requires a confirmed identity step at enrollment;
`self_host` grants membership straight from a valid grant.

oneOf.description: The hosted plane: enrollment requires a confirmed, already-rostered identity.
A self-hosted plane: enrollment grants membership from a valid grant (no human identity step).

EnrollmentPending.description:
A pending device-authorization a `follow` surfaced — the human visits `verification_uri_complete` (which
embeds the `user_code`), then the client re-polls. **INFERRED.**

expires_at.description: The session expiry as an RFC-3339 string, if it expires.

user_code.description: The short code shown for cross-checking on the verification page.

verification_uri_complete.description: The verification URL with the `user_code` embedded — the human opens it to approve the session.

FollowOffer.description: A single skill offered at `follow` — disclosed, awaiting a direct human yes (TOFU). **INFERRED.**

Offer.description:
The re-disclosed bytes a `pull` offers (confirm-each / first-receive). **INFERRED fields** — the
spec pins that the offer re-discloses + re-binds the digest, not its exact shape.

TriggerReport.description:
The result of installing a currency trigger — what was touched + the marker, so re-install is
idempotent (the marker is a managed sentinel block in the config edit, NEVER in skill bytes).

marker_id.description: `topos` + harness id + schema version + command identity.

touched_path.description: The config file edited (never a skill dir).

oneOf.description: An equivalent command exists without our marker — adopt-or-leave, never blind-append.

VerifiedDomainStatus.description: A workspace's domain-verification state — snake_case on the wire.
